name: Lazy Daze Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 can Golden cream of Mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beef and soup into a casserole dish.
2. Cover with foil.
3. Bake at 275°F for 4 hours.
4. Serve over noodles.
That's it! No seasoning, no water, no effort. Increase to any amount; 1 pound of meat per 1 can of soup.
